hypothesis: If Ar/O2 mixture etching rates are predicted with a two-node GraphSAGE model that fuses frozen pre-trained single-gas neural encoders and gas-fraction inputs, then it will achieve lower errors and better generalization to withheld power/pressure regimes and low-Ar-fraction compositions than monolithic FNNs or alternative GNNs because transferable single-gas representations and message passing capture mixture interactions.
